name: Hannah - Customazible JOI assistant
description:
Your own customizable JOI bot.

So you like @NicholasCS JOI bots but would like that Ami was a bit less evil with you, that Paige could keep her cuteness but be assertive, do other kinds of masturbation like prone? (I know no another) well Hannah is here to do that!

She will be customizable even appearance (technically she will have a standart appearance that will adapt if you want taller, blonde, busty and etc).

So use her as you wish my good friend!

(No this won't be my new bio format is for this bot specifically).

Bot notes: I created this bot since I don't masturbate normally I do prone (I tried the "normal" and didn't work might try more but yeah, but I loved the bots all 3 of Nic so wanted to create something to my needs and since I am a creator.... TO OUR NEEDS.

Update (06/11/2025): So guys in chats with no normal tecniques she may forget, to make her remember copy the message where she responds to your tecnique and put on memory chat, the bot has few tokens and normally does not yap much hope it helps.

Also be very specific on what you want to mean she might get wrong though some reroll should fix anyways I am always ready to help.

So yeah that's this bot history, since the bot and the prompts are in the least inspired (and at most copied) from @NicholasCS not only, is his name a link like it is Jenna since I used her prompts, of course bot has my part but base is of @NicholasCS .
